ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inning */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the inning belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the inning */,
  "inning_type" TEXT /* Type of inning (e.g., first, second) */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored in the inning */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets lost in the inning */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Overs played in the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "batting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inning the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., bowled, lbw, caught) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_stats" (
  "bowling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling statistic */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inning the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded by the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "best_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fielding_stats" (
  "fielding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fielding statistic */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inning the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken by the player */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings taken by the player */,
  "runouts" INTEGER /* Number of runouts taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fielding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the outcome belongs to */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (e.g., runs, wickets) */,
  "mom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Man of the Match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_mom_id FOREIGN KEY ("mom_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the profile belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team profile */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the profile belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain of the team */,
  "team_colours" TEXT /* Colours of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach (e.g., batting, bowling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the umpire */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the umpire (e.g., on-field, third) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_umpires" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was won */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
